title_descriptor: High Visible Fabric Laminated with Reflective Strips for Safety Jacket Fabric
page_title: High Visible Fabric Laminated with Reflective Strips for Safety Jacket Fabric - ArNeo Eco +R400 - Ariteks
spec_line: 120 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Reflective Strips Laminated Knit Fabric
description_blocks: ArNeo Eco +R400 is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors.
They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
The edge of the fabric is laminated with 5 cm reflective EN 20471 certified strips.
It eliminate to sew reflective strips on make up phase.

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
120 g/m² , 100% Polyester, High Visible, Reflective Strips Laminated Knit Fabric

ArNeo Eco +R400 is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets. It is EN ISO 20471 certified. Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light. As a result they shine more than other objects. The edge of the fabric is laminated with 5 cm reflective EN 20471 certified strips. It eliminate to sew reflective strips on make up phase. Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75/72 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 120 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength >1000 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Safety Jacket Quality Management Done ISO 9001 High Visibility Done EN ISO 20471 Technical Documents >> ArNeo Eco R400 Data Sheet Certificates TS EN ISO 20471 TS EN ISO 20471 Test Report

ArNeo Eco +R400 is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets.
It is EN ISO 20471 certified.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors.
They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
The edge of the fabric is laminated with 5 cm reflective EN 20471 certified strips.
It eliminate to sew reflective strips on make up phase.
